description: Curated gold-standard relevance set for offline search quality evaluation. relevantUids are PubMed IDs (no prefix). offTopicUids should be populated from live search results that the team agrees are irrelevant.

queries.query: SGLT2 inhibitors heart failure reduced ejection fraction randomized trial
queries.notes: EMPEROR-Reduced (34706189), DAPA-HF (31535829). 32865377 = subgroup analysis — verify in DB.

queries.query: low tidal volume ventilation ARDS lung protective
queries.notes: ARDSNet ARMA trial (10793162), PROSEVA prone positioning (23688302).
